steps.title: Identify the logical contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts imports' ability to reduce expenses with what transport costs do to that advantage for distant consumers. The word must describe how costs affect the price advantage.

steps.title: Match the required meaning
steps.content:
Nullify means to eliminate the effect of something—exactly what transport costs do to the price advantage.

The other choices describe judgment or criticism (underestimate, misconstrue, denigrate) rather than the economic impact of costs eliminating a benefit.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
